+ back to UGC Video Creator Workflow
UGC Video Creator Workflow

Step 12 — Talkie Video Gen

Go to HeyGen and create talkie clips from your audio chunks, one line at a time. Use Photo to Video mode and upload the image you want to turn into a talkie. If you're using a 1:1 image, click zoom-out so your final generation stays 1:1. You can prompt for extra motion (touching her skin, a hand gesture) under Advanced Settings.

HeyGen uses the shared team Glamrs login.

← Previous step Next step →
